title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> If successful, the Faustian Bargain i
content:
✔ If successful, the Faustian Bargain is erased, but the counter-player suffers an XP loss.
✔ If they fail, the Bargain stays, and the counter-player also loses XP.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Makes Faustian deals more rare and special.
✔ Forces players to take risks.
✔ Balances temptation with consequence.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS FOR VERSION 7.0

1. How many re-rolls should a student be allowed per semester?

✔ Should it be one per month, or based on XP cost?

2. Should Observer influence be known or remain a mystery?

✔ If known, players can track it and prepare.
✔ If unknown, it remains a background force that subtly changes things.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 394 (chunk 394/555)
